# AI music content flood

## Signal layer

`visibility/supply`

## Pattern to test

large synthetic catalog overwhelms discovery.

## Graph representation

artist-track-upload graph.

## Useful metrics

upload velocity, track duration similarity, stream/fan mismatch.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

Deezer AI upload reporting.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `ai music content flood` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
